content.method: Workforce projection modeling using Ministry of Education staffing and demographic data, cross-referenced with regional teacher shortage statistics and retirement/attrition trends; scenario analysis under alternative reform timelines.
content.question: What is the current and projected teacher workforce capacity (supply, qualifications, rural distribution) relative to the demands of either a full comprehensive-school restructuring (T2/T6) or continued operation of the existing tracked system, given documented aging and shortages?
content.why_it_matters: Implementation feasibility for the most structurally ambitious proposals hinges on workforce capacity; underestimating this risk could produce quality degradation regardless of structural design merit.
